mapper.select: SELECT CHAMP_NO AS champNo, CHAMP_NAME AS champName, CHAMP_POSITION AS champPosition, CHAMP_ROLES AS champRoles, CHAMP_IMG AS champImg, CHAMP_INTRO AS champIntro, CHAMP_NAME AS id FROM CHAMP_INFO ORDER BY CHAMP_NAME ASC
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO CHAMP_INFO C USING DUAL ON (C.CHAMP_NAME = #{champName}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET CHAMP_POSITION = #{champPosition}, CHAMP_ROLES = #{champRoles}, CHAMP_IMG = #{champImg}, CHAMP_INTRO = #{champIntro} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (CHAMP_NO, CHAMP_NAME, CHAMP_POSITION, CHAMP_ROLES, CHAMP_IMG, CHAMP_INTRO) VALUES (SEQ_CHAMP_NO.NEXTVAL, #{champName}, #{champPosition}, #{champRoles}, #{champImg}, #{champIntro})

MERGE INTO CHAMP_SKILLS_INFO S USING DUAL ON (S.CHAMP_NO = #{champNo}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET SKILL_P_NAME = #{skillPName}, SKILL_P_DESC = #{skillPDesc}, SKILL_P_IMG = #{skillPImg}, SKILL_Q_NAME = #{skillQName}, SKILL_Q_DESC = #{skillQDesc}, SKILL_Q_IMG = #{skillQImg}, SKILL_W_NAME = #{skillWName}, SKILL_W_DESC = #{skillWDesc}, SKILL_W_IMG = #{skillWImg}, SKILL_E_NAME = #{skillEName}, SKILL_E_DESC = #{skillEDesc}, SKILL_E_IMG = #{skillEImg}, SKILL_R_NAME = #{skillRName}, SKILL_R_DESC = #{skillRDesc}, SKILL_R_IMG = #{skillRImg} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( CHAMP_NO, SKILL_P_NAME, SKILL_P_DESC, SKILL_P_IMG, SKILL_Q_NAME, SKILL_Q_DESC, SKILL_Q_IMG, SKILL_W_NAME, SKILL_W_DESC, SKILL_W_IMG, SKILL_E_NAME, SKILL_E_DESC, SKILL_E_IMG, SKILL_R_NAME, SKILL_R_DESC, SKILL_R_IMG ) VALUES ( #{champNo}, #{skillPName}, #{skillPDesc}, #{skillPImg}, #{skillQName}, #{skillQDesc}, #{skillQImg}, #{skillWName}, #{skillWDesc}, #{skillWImg}, #{skillEName}, #{skillEDesc}, #{skillEImg}, #{skillRName}, #{skillRDesc}, #{skillRImg} )
mapper.select: SELECT C.CHAMP_NO, C.CHAMP_NAME, C.CHAMP_IMG, C.CHAMP_INTRO, CASE WHEN LOWER(C.CHAMP_POSITION) LIKE '%assassin%' THEN '암살자' WHEN LOWER(C.CHAMP_POSITION) LIKE '%fighter%' THEN '전사' WHEN LOWER(C.CHAMP_POSITION) LIKE '%mage%' THEN '마법사' WHEN LOWER(C.CHAMP_POSITION) LIKE '%marksman%' THEN '원거리 딜러' WHEN LOWER(C.CHAMP_POSITION) LIKE '%support%' THEN '서포터' WHEN LOWER(C.CHAMP_POSITION) LIKE '%tank%' THEN '탱커' ELSE C.CHAMP_POSITION END as CHAMP_POSITION, S.*, K.CHAMP_SKIN_NO, K.CHAMP_SKIN_NAME, K.CHAMP_SKIN_IMG FROM CHAMP_INFO C LEFT JOIN CHAMP_SKILLS_INFO S ON C.CHAMP_NO = S.CHAMP_NO LEFT JOIN CHAMP_SKIN_INFO K ON C.CHAMP_NO = K.CHAMP_NO WHERE C.CHAMP_NO = #{champNo}
SELECT ITEM_NO AS itemNo, ITEM_NAME AS itemName, ITEM_PRICE AS itemPrice, ITEM_INFO AS itemInfo, ITEM_IMG AS itemImg, ITEM_TAG AS itemTag FROM LOL_ITEM_INFO ORDER BY ITEM_PRICE ASC, ITEM_NAME ASC
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO LOL_ITEM_INFO I USING DUAL ON (I.ITEM_NO = #{itemNo}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET ITEM_NAME = #{itemName}, ITEM_PRICE = #{itemPrice}, ITEM_INFO = #{itemInfo}, ITEM_IMG = #{itemImg}, ITEM_TAG = #{itemTag} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (ITEM_NO, ITEM_NAME, ITEM_PRICE, ITEM_INFO, ITEM_IMG, ITEM_TAG) VALUES (#{itemNo}, #{itemName}, #{itemPrice}, #{itemInfo}, #{itemImg}, #{itemTag})

MERGE INTO RUNE_INFO R USING DUAL ON (R.RUNE_NAME = #{runeName}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET RUNE_INFO = #{runeInfo}, RUNE_IMG = #{runeImg} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (RUNE_NO, RUNE_NAME, RUNE_INFO, RUNE_IMG) VALUES (SEQ_RUNE_NO.NEXTVAL, #{runeName}, #{runeInfo}, #{runeImg})
mapper.select: SELECT RUNE_NO as runeNo, RUNE_NAME as runeName, RUNE_INFO as runeInfo, RUNE_IMG as runeImg FROM RUNE_INFO ORDER BY RUNE_NO ASC
SELECT TALENT_NO as talentNo, RUNE_NO as runeNo, TALENT_NAME as talentName, TALENT_INFO as talentInfo, TALENT_IMG as talentImg FROM TALENT_INFO WHERE RUNE_NO = #{runeNo} ORDER BY TALENT_NO ASC
